title: Canvas engine + pixel buffer + render pipeline
note: Passed Review+QA+objective gate first try on wf_-13. Worktree branched from U-001 (a21e10e) while master had advanced to U-002 (8750399); integrated by applying only the genuine U-003 changes (new src/core + src/platform engine files, additive barrel exports, vite.config held-out include) onto master and hand-merging the App.tsx/App.css semantic conflict (both U-002 showcase and U-003 canvas preview repurposed the App root). Merged App wraps the U-003 workbench+CanvasStage in U-002's ThemeProvider+CrtOverlay. Post-merge master: typecheck/test(138)/build/browser(14)/e2e(2) all exit 0, dist artifacts present, biome check . clean (fixed nested-root by gitignoring .claude/). Integrated 2026-07-01.

title: Drawing tools
note: First worktree -23 FAILED Review/QA (HIGH: copy/cut/paste not on selection); fix worktree -36 passed Reviewer+QA+objective gate (held-out 7/7, byte-identical, 272 unit tests). Clean squash-merge: -36 cut from master@ccb5290 (base==tip), package.json unchanged, no CRLF churn / no semantic conflict. Post-merge master: typecheck 0, vitest 272/18 (incl held-out), build 0 + dist artifacts (231.76KB<250KB), lint 0/89. Spec-vs-criteria reconcile: master-spec §3.2 Pencil Alt-eyedropper unimplemented + QA F-1 copy-button re-render deferred to U-012; single-undo-per-gesture deferred to U-006. Integrated 2026-07-01.

title: Color & palette system
note: Worktree -24 FAILED Review (HIGH H-1: indexed/palette-lock did not restrict live drawing); fix progressed -35 (QA) -> -43 (final superset: in-component CanvasStage lock, deep-frozen builtins, extra browser test). Reviewer+QA+gate all PASS on -43 — BUT all three validated -43 as an uncommitted tree over master@ccb5290 (pre-U-004), so the U-004+U-005 combination was never tested by them. Integration was a genuine 3-way merge: U-004 and U-005 both rewrote CanvasStage.tsx from the common U-003 base (U-004 -> ToolSession tool-belt; U-005 -> buffer-based palette-lock preview). Reconciled by keeping U-004's ToolSession architecture and re-implementing the palette-lock on it: seedForgeMotif into the session buffer, an fg-sync effect feeding effectivePaintColor->session.fg (snapped when locked), and an indexed effect that quantizes/paletteSwaps session.getBuffer() via session.setBuffer(). Trivial additive conflicts in core/state barrels + vite.config held-out include. Post-merge master: typecheck 0, vitest 338/22 (incl U-003/4/5 held-out), browser 27/6 (incl 3 CanvasStage palette-lock tests on the new architecture), build 0 (index JS 258.84KB/81.93KB gz), e2e 4/4 (incl indexed-lock on built app), core coverage 97.09%, lint 0/112. Integrated 2026-07-01.

title: Export: PNG (scaled) + SVG
note: Passed Review+QA+objective gate first try on wf_-25. Worktree branched from U-003 (ccb5290) while master had advanced to U-005; integrated as a 3-way merge — additive conflicts in core/platform/ui barrels + vite.config held-out include (kept both), plus one semantic fix: dialog getSource re-pointed from the U-003-era bufferRef (removed by U-005 refactor) to sessionRef.current?.getBuffer(). npm install synced new browser-fs-access dep (first post-merge typecheck was a false red until node_modules reconciled). Post-merge master: typecheck 0, vitest 372/26 (incl held-out U-009 3/3), browser 38/8, build 0 + dist artifacts, lint 0/127. Reality matches master-spec §3.8/§5; multi-frame PNG-zip deferred to U-010 (needs U-008 frames). Integrated 2026-07-01.

title: History / undo-redo

Reviewer directed integrating -55 not -51. Clean squash-merge (worktree base==master cb66d7d, no sibling merged since, zero conflicts, no dep change). Post-merge master: build 0 (dist index JS 279.00KB/88.64KB gz), vitest 419/30 incl held-out U-006 5/5, reward-hack scan clean. Structural-undo for layer/frame/resize/palette deferred to U-007/8/11/12 via delivered applyListEdit primitive (N-1/F-2/F-3/F-4 advisories). See ADR-014. Integrated 2026-07-01.
